name: C2xSecCertificateGetSignerHashedId8
title: C2xSecCertificateGetSignerHashedId8
syntax: long C2xSecCertificateGetSignerHashedId8( long certificateHandle, byte signerHashedId8[] );
description: Gets the signer (parent) certificate’s HashedId8 digest. In some protocols the digest is called CertId8.
